name: Sonae Industria, S.G.P.S., S.A.
summary: Sonae Ind√É¬∫stria, S.G.P.S., S.A., together with its subsidiaries, produces and sells wood based panels and derivative products in Europe and internationally. It offers raw and technical products, including particleboards, medium density fiberboards, and oriented strand boards; value added products, such as melamine faced boards, accoustic panels, and others; laminates and components; and decorative products. The company also provides chemical products. It serves furniture, construction, and interior design industries.
